checks.label: Substance floor (RULE -1)
checks.evidence: All 19 bullets present with full canonical substance. InGenius: 4 bullets identical to canonical (20+/10+/25+/70+/600+/78%/75% all intact). NextGen: 4 bullets all present (2,000+ intact, 5 cross-functional projects intact), reordered only. ODN: 3 bullets matching canonical (300+/$362K/NGO decision-making all intact). Vestas: 4 bullets present (12/23/3 locations/1,000+ all intact). Kronos: 4 bullets present (566% intact). No clause dropped, no metric thinned, no bullet deleted.

checks.label: Truth / no-relabel (RULE 0)
checks.evidence: ODN described as leave-cost/absenteeism diagnosis + NGO leadership decision-making - not relabeled as community/ERG. No Jira or invented tools in skills section (matches canonical vocabulary exactly). No 230+/80+/top-3-univ Kronos fabrication. No $340K/17-launches composite. All metrics trace to canonical source. Skills block matches content_library canonical allow-list.

checks.label: Bullet counts
checks.evidence: InGenius=4, NextGen=4, ODN=3 (canonical 3), Vestas=4, Kronos=4. All counts match fixed requirement. No bullets deleted to save space; reordering only within each experience.

checks.label: Cover substance + voice
checks.evidence: Real metrics bolded throughout: 3 global locations, 2,000+ employee experiences, 20+ programs/10+ vendors, 70+ staff/75% cut, 600+ participants, 78% program enrollment rate, 25+ global stakeholders. Companies bolded at first mention: Vestas Wind Systems, NextGen Healthcare, InGenius Prep. 14+ body bolds (above 6-bold floor). Org-psych close with diagnose/collaborate/track triad present. analytical organizer with a growth mindset present. No relocation over-commitment. No visa mention. Dear Nike Hiring Team, salutation correct. Voice warm and grounded.

checks.label: Header/location + Wesleyan coursework
checks.evidence: Header location = Beaverton, OR - correct for Nike Beaverton HQ on-site role (location-follows-role-city rule). Wesleyan Relevant Coursework present: Educational Psychology, Practicum in Education Studies, Psychological Testing, Learning and Motivation. USC Relevant Coursework also present.

checks.label: Cover canonical-skeleton adherence
checks.evidence: Opener = belief sentence (People support isn't just about answering questions - from my experience, it's about creating a continuous cycle of collecting insights, analyzing data, and refining solutions) with approved company bridge clause + background sentence + I look forward to bringing close. Tagline line 2 = Dedicated to Improving People/Employee Experience (approved EX variant). Paragraph order Vestas->NextGen->InGenius preserved. Org-psych close with analytical organizer with a growth mindset present. Prior-FAIL trailing clause confirmed REMOVED - NextGen para ends cleanly at develop targeted people strategies. (period). Skill-phrase swaps in Para-1 are JD-vocabulary rewording of real experience. No free-written standalone new sentences detected.
